svg.title: Synalux POS — Uarcode scan
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for Uarcode scan. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Point barcode scanner or camera at product
Supports: Code 128, EAN-13, QR Code, PDF417
+ Scan or tap item to add
Order opened: 12:44 PM · Server: J. Smith
Source: POS Register (iPad) · Scan mode active
Scan item → enter quantity received → update pos_inventory
(type = 'receive'). Webhook triggers label print job if trigger enabled.
BarcodeBridge.swift: HID scanner input captured natively
No match → prompt create or search.
Auto-print label on receive if trigger enabled.
Bridge call: window.scanResult(itemJSON) → POS adds to live order in-place.
